CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-28-2003 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-11-2003 Continued To Jun-06-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On April 17, 2003
Off Calendar Apr-21-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan. Clerks: P. Dias/Sajja R., Reporter: Adonis Duffy. Elizabeth A. Skane, Esq. represented Plaintiff, Far West Plumbing. Harvey Ison was sworn and examined on behalf of the plaintiff. The Court receives evidence and good cause appearing the Court grants judgment as follows: Principal: $14,006.44, Fees: $3,045.00, Costs: $334.50, Interest: $2,100.98. Order signed in open court.
